examples: Whatever happens, never take an overdose of this medicine.
An overdose of sun, sea, sand and chlorine can give lighter hair a green tinge.
It's a thoughtful examination of the dangers of our computing overdose and a historical overview of how technological advances change consciousness.
PCBs are actually not carcinogenic unless you repeatedly overdose a laboratory mouse with them.
The Chicago experts gave some advice, but there was no way to reverse the overdose.
